name: Marshmallow Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. To make crispy cakes, place 60 petit fours cases on two baking sheets. In a saucepan, melt the butter and golden syrup over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in drinking chocolate and rice cereal until well mixed.
3. Spoon the mixture into petit fours cases and refrigerate until set.
4. To make marshmallow cream, mix cornflour with a small amount of cream in a saucepan.
5. Add the remainder of the cream and marshmallows to the saucepan.
6. Cook over gentle heat until the mixture thickens and melts, stirring constantly.
7. Pour into a fondue pot. Serve hot with crispy cakes.
(Serves 6-8)
